as.prompt_info: Autonomous System (AS) information including ASN, name, BGP prefix, and country code

whois.prompt_info: WHOIS information including network handle, network name, organization handle, and organization name

os.prompt_info: Operating system information including vendor, product, and version

sw.prompt_info: Software information including vendor, product, and version

hw.prompt_info: Software information including vendor, product, and version

body.prompt_info: HTTP information including html body content

hfavicons.prompt_info: HTTP information including http favicon URLs

hpart.prompt_info: HTTP information including html tags and http favicon URLs

http.prompt_info: HTTP information including html body content, html tags, and http favicon URLs

certificate.prompt_info: Certificate information including subjects, issuers, and TLS versions

overall.prompt_info: Overall information including Autonomous System, WHOIS, OS, Software, Hardware, Service Distribution, HTTP Tags and Favicons, Certificate, and DNS
